events.event_description: U.S. Legation established in Brazil with Condy Raguet presenting credentials as the first Chargé d'Affaires.

evidence.quote: Condy Raguet, Chargé d'Affaires. Appointed: 1825-03-09. Credentials presented: 1825-10-29. Left post on 1827-04-16.

events.event_description: Mission elevated within the Legation: William Hunter promoted from Chargé d'Affaires to Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary, the first Minister-level head of the U.S. Legation in Brazil.

evidence.quote:
William Jr Hunter, Chargé d'Affaires. Appointed: 1834-06-28. Credentials presented: 1835-01-07. Promoted to Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary 1842-01-01.

William Jr Hunter, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1841-09-13. Credentials presented: 1842-01-01.

events.event_description: U.S. Legation elevated to Embassy; David Eugene Thompson promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials as first Ambassador.

evidence.quote:
David Eugene Thompson, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1902-12-08. Credentials presented: 1903-04-01. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1905-03-16.

David Eugene Thompson, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1905-01-13. Credentials presented: 1905-03-16.
